\newcommand{\ottBstep}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Bstep}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline

\newcommand{\ottRRed}{

\newcommand{\ottBrstep}{

\newcommand{\ottSMul}{

% defnss
% defns conflict
%% defn cfl
\newcommand{\ottdrulecflXXrcd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  A  \ottsym{\}} \oslash \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  B  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{cfl\_rcd}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulecflXXandl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ A \oslash C }%
}{
 A  \, \& \,  B \oslash C }{%
{\ottdrulename{cfl\_andl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulecflXXandr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ B \oslash C }%
}{
 A  \, \& \,  B \oslash C }{%
{\ottdrulename{cfl\_andr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulecflXXrandl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ A \oslash B }%
}{
 A \oslash B  \, \& \,  C }{%
{\ottdrulename{cfl\_randl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulecflXXrandr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ A \oslash C }%
}{
 A \oslash B  \, \& \,  C }{%
{\ottdrulename{cfl\_randr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncfl}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ A \oslash B $}{\ottcom{Conflict}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecflXXrcd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecflXXandl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecflXXandr{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecflXXrandl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecflXXrandr{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsconflict}{
\ottdefncfl{}}

% defns unique
%% defn uq
\newcommand{\ottdruleuqXXrcd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \mathsf{ok}\, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  A  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{uq\_rcd}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleuqXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{ok}\, A }%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{ok}\, B }%
\ottpremise{ \neg   (  A \oslash B  \!)  }%
}{
 \mathsf{ok}\, A  \, \& \,  B }{%
{\ottdrulename{uq\_and}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnuq}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \mathsf{ok}\, A $}{\ottcom{Uniqueness}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleuqXXrcd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleuqXXand{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsunique}{
\ottdefnuq{}}

% defns ctm
%% defn ctm
\newcommand{\ottdrulectmXXrcd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottmv{l} : A \in \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  A  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{ctm\_rcd}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulectmXXandl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l} : A \in B }%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l}  \notin label( C ) }%
}{
 \ottmv{l} : A \in B  \, \& \,  C }{%
{\ottdrulename{ctm\_andl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulectmXXandr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l} : A \in C }%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l}  \notin label( B ) }%
}{
 \ottmv{l} : A \in B  \, \& \,  C }{%
{\ottdrulename{ctm\_andr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctm}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottmv{l} : A \in B $}{\ottcom{Containment}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulectmXXrcd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulectmXXandl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulectmXXandr{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsctm}{
\ottdefnctm{}}

% defns Typing
%% defn Typing
\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXctx}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \textsf{?}   :  \Gamma}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_ctx}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ottmv{i}   :   \mathsf{Int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXtop}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \varepsilon  :  \varepsilon}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_top}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \underline{ \ottmv{n} }   :   \mathsf{lookup}( \Gamma ,  \ottmv{n} ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXmerge}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  A}%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  B}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A  \, \& \,  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_merge}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  A  \rightarrow  B}%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e  :  B}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda { A }.\, e   :  A  \rightarrow  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXbox}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  \Gamma_1}%
\ottpremise{\Gamma_1  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_box}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXclos}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\varepsilon  \vdash  v  :  \Gamma_1}%
\ottpremise{\Gamma_1  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e  :  B}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle   :  A  \rightarrow  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_clos}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXproj}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e  :  B}%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{lookup}( B ,  \ottmv{n} )   \ottsym{=}  A}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   e . \ottmv{n}   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_proj}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXrcd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  \ottsym{=}  e  \ottsym{\}}  :  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  A  \ottsym{\}}}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_rcd}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTypXXsel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  e  :  B}%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l} : A \in B }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   e . \ottmv{l}   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Typ\_sel}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnTyping}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A$}{\ottcom{Typing}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXctx{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXtop{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXmerge{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXlam{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXbox{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXclos{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXproj{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXrcd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTypXXsel{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsTyping}{
\ottdefnTyping{}}

% defns Rtyping
%% defn Rtyping
\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXctx}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \textsf{?}   :  \Gamma}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_ctx}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottmv{i}   :   \mathsf{Int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXtop}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \varepsilon  :  \varepsilon}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_top}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \underline{ \ottmv{n} }   :   \mathsf{lookup}( \Gamma ,  \ottmv{n} ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXmerge}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  A}%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  B}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A  \, \& \,  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_merge}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  A  \rightarrow  B}%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e  :  B}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \lambda { A }.\, e   :  A  \rightarrow  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXbox}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :  \Gamma_1}%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma_1  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_box}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXclos}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  v  :  \Gamma_1}%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma_1  \, \& \,  A  \vdash  e  :  B}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle   :  A  \rightarrow  B}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_clos}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXproj}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   e . \ottmv{n}   :   \mathsf{lookup}( A ,  \ottmv{n} ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_proj}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXrcd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  \ottsym{=}  e  \ottsym{\}}  :  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  :  A  \ottsym{\}}}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_rcd}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXsel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :  B}%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{l} : A \in B }%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   e . \ottmv{l}   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_sel}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXloc}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{o  :  A \, \in \, \Sigma}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  o  :   \text{Ref} \,  A }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_loc}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXref}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \text{ref} \, e   :   \text{Ref} \,  A }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_ref}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXderef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :   \text{Ref} \,  A }%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   !  e   :  A}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_deref}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRtypXXassign}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :   \text{Ref} \,  A }%
\ottpremise{\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  :  A}%
}{
\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :=  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}   :  \varepsilon}{%
{\ottdrulename{Rtyp\_assign}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnRtyping}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$\Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  e  :  A$}{\ottcom{Typing}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXctx{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXtop{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXmerge{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXlam{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXbox{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXclos{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXproj{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXrcd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXsel{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXloc{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXref{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXderef{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRtypXXassign{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsRtyping}{
\ottdefnRtyping{}}

% defns select
%% defn sel
\newcommand{\ottdruleselXXrec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  \ottsym{=}  v  \ottsym{\}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{sel\_rec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleselXXmrgl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v }%
}{
 \ottsym{(}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{)} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{sel\_mrgl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleselXXmrgr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{2}}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v }%
}{
 \ottsym{(}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{)} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{sel\_mrgr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsel}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v' $}{\ottcom{Selection}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleselXXrec{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleselXXmrgl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleselXXmrgr{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsselect}{
\ottdefnsel{}}

% defns Reduction
%% defn step
\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXeval}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e \hookrightarrow e' }%
}{
 v \vdash  F [  e  ]  \hookrightarrow  F [  e'  ]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_eval}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXctx}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \textsf{?}  \hookrightarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_ctx}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \underline{ \ottmv{n} }  \hookrightarrow  \mathsf{lookupv}( v ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXmerger}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_merger}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXclosure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \lambda { A }.\, e  \hookrightarrow  \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_closure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXbeta}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \langle v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  \, v_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow  \ottsym{(}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{)}  \triangleright  e  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXbox}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash e \hookrightarrow e' }%
}{
 v \vdash  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e  \hookrightarrow  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_box}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXboxv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \hookrightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_boxv}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXproj}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{n}  \hookrightarrow  \mathsf{lookupv}( v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_proj}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleStepXXsel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l}  \hookrightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Step\_sel}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnstep}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash e \hookrightarrow e' $}{\ottcom{Small-step Operational Semantics}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXeval{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXctx{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXmerger{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXclosure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXbeta{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXbox{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXboxv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXproj{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleStepXXsel{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsReduction}{
\ottdefnstep{}}

% defns Multi
%% defn multi
\newcommand{\ottdruleMultiXXrefl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash e \hookrightarrow ^* e }{%
{\ottdrulename{Multi\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleMultiXXstep}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e \hookrightarrow e' }%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e' \hookrightarrow ^* e'' }%
}{
 v \vdash e \hookrightarrow ^* e'' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Multi\_step}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnmulti}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash e \hookrightarrow ^* e' $}{\ottcom{Multistep Reduction}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMultiXXrefl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMultiXXstep{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsMulti}{
\ottdefnmulti{}}

% defns RMulti
%% defn rmulti

\newcommand{\ottdefnrmulti}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash \mu ; e \hookrightarrow ^* \mu' ; e' $}{\ottcom{Multistep Reduction}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsRMulti}{
\ottdefnrmulti{}}

% defns Bstep
%% defn bstep
\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXctx}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \textsf{?}  \Rightarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_ctx}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \underline{ \ottmv{n} }  \Rightarrow  \mathsf{lookupv}( v ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \ottmv{i}  \Rightarrow  \ottmv{i}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXunit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \varepsilon \Rightarrow \varepsilon }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_unit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \lambda { A }.\, e  \Rightarrow  \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXclos}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash  \langle v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  \Rightarrow  \langle v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_clos}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXbox}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_box}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXproj}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash  e . \ottmv{n}  \Rightarrow  \mathsf{lookupv}( v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_proj}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXmerge}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ v  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_merge}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \Rightarrow  \langle v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  }%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}} \vdash e \Rightarrow v' }%
}{
 v \vdash e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXrec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  \ottsym{=}  e  \ottsym{\}} \Rightarrow \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{l}  \ottsym{=}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_rec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBstepXXsel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash e \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash  e . \ottmv{l}  \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Bstep\_sel}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnbstep}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash e \Rightarrow e' $}{\ottcom{Big-step Operational Semantics}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXctx{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXunit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXlam{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXclos{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXbox{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXproj{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXmerge{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXrec{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBstepXXsel{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsBstep}{
\ottdefnbstep{}}

% defns RRed
%% defn rstep
\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXeval}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash \mu ; e \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;  e' }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  F [  e  ]  \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;   F [  e'  ]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_eval}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXctx}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \textsf{?}  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;  v }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_ctx}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \underline{ \ottmv{n} }  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;   \mathsf{lookupv}( v ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXmerger}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash \mu ; e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;  e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ; v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_merger}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXclosure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \lambda { A }.\, e  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;   \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_closure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXbeta}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \langle v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \lambda   A  .\, e  \rangle  \, v_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;   \ottsym{(}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \fatcomma  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{)}  \triangleright  e  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXbox}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \vdash \mu ; e \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;  e' }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e  \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;   v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  e'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_box}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXboxv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \triangleright  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;  v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_boxv}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXprojv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{n}  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;   \mathsf{lookupv}( v_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{n} )  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_projv}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXsel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l} \rightsquigarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} . \ottmv{l}  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;  v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_sel}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXrefv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ o  \notin dom( \mu ) }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \text{ref} \, v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \hookrightarrow    \mu ,  o = v_{{\mathrm{1}}}   ;  o }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_refv}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXderef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{o  \ottsym{=}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, \in \, \mu}%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  !  o  \hookrightarrow   \mu  ;  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_deref}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRstepXXassign}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ o  \in dom( \mu ) }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  o  :=  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \hookrightarrow   \mu  \ottsym{[}  o  \mapsto  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{]}  ;  \varepsilon }{%
{\ottdrulename{Rstep\_assign}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrstep}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash \mu ; e \hookrightarrow   \mu'  ;  e' $}{\ottcom{Small-step Operational Semantics}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXeval{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXctx{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXmerger{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXclosure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXbeta{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXbox{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXboxv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXprojv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXsel{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXrefv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXderef{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRstepXXassign{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsRRed}{
\ottdefnrstep{}}

% defns Brstep
%% defn brstep
\newcommand{\ottdruleBrstepXXloc}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ; o \Rightarrow \mu ; o }{%
{\ottdrulename{Brstep\_loc}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBrstepXXref}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash \mu ; e \Rightarrow \mu' ; v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ o  \notin dom( \mu' ) }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  \text{ref} \, e  \Rightarrow  \mu' ,  o = v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  ; o }{%
{\ottdrulename{Brstep\_ref}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBrstepXXderef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash \mu ; e \Rightarrow \mu' ; o }%
\ottpremise{o  \ottsym{=}  v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, \in \, \mu'}%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  !  e  \Rightarrow \mu' ; v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Brstep\_deref}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleBrstepXXassign}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash \mu ; e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \Rightarrow \mu_{{\mathrm{1}}} ; o }%
\ottpremise{ v \vdash \mu_{{\mathrm{1}}} ; e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow \mu_{{\mathrm{2}}} ; v_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ o  \in dom( \mu_{{\mathrm{2}}} ) }%
}{
 v \vdash \mu ;  e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  :=  e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \Rightarrow \mu_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{[}  o  \mapsto  v_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{]} ; \varepsilon }{%
{\ottdrulename{Brstep\_assign}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnbrstep}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v \vdash \mu ; e \Rightarrow \mu' ; e' $}{\ottcom{Extended Big-step Operational Semantics}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBrstepXXloc{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBrstepXXref{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBrstepXXderef{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleBrstepXXassign{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsBrstep}{
\ottdefnbrstep{}}

% defns Red
%% defn red
\newcommand{\ottdruleRedXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
   \underline{ \ottmv{n} }   [   v_1 \cdots v_n \cdots v_m   ]  \hookrightarrow  v _ \ottmv{n}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Red\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRedXXbeta}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{(}   \ottsym{(}   \lambda . e   \ottsym{)}  [  s  ]   \ottsym{)} \, v \hookrightarrow  e  [   v  \cdot  s   ]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Red\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRedXXappl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ c_{{\mathrm{1}}} \hookrightarrow c'_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
}{
 c_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, c_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow c'_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, c_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Red\_appl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRedXXappr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ c_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow c'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, c_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, c'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Red\_appr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRedXXappdist}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \ottsym{(}  e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{)}  [  s  ]  \hookrightarrow \ottsym{(}   e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  [  s  ]   \ottsym{)} \, \ottsym{(}   e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  [  s  ]   \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Red\_appdist}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnred}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ c \hookrightarrow c' $}{\ottcom{Reduction of $\lambda\,\widehat{\rho}$}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRedXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRedXXbeta{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRedXXappl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRedXXappr{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRedXXappdist{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsRed}{
\ottdefnred{}}

% defns Styp
%% defn styp
\newcommand{\ottdrulestypXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash   \ottmv{i}  :  \mathsf{Int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{styp\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulestypXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma_{\lambda} [  \ottmv{n}  ]   \ottsym{=}  A}%
}{
 \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash   \underline{ \ottmv{n} }  : A }{%
{\ottdrulename{styp\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulestypXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}} : A  \rightarrow  B }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash  e_{{\mathrm{2}}} : A }%
}{
 \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash  e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} : B }{%
{\ottdrulename{styp\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulestypXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{  \Gamma_{\lambda} ,  A   \Vdash  e : B }%
}{
 \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash   \lambda { A }.\, e  : A  \rightarrow  B }{%
{\ottdrulename{styp\_lam}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnstyp}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma_{\lambda}  \Vdash  e : A $}{\ottcom{Typing of STLC}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulestypXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulestypXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulestypXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulestypXXlam{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsStyp}{
\ottdefnstyp{}}

% defns Sred
%% defn sred
\newcommand{\ottdrulesredXXbeta}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{(}   \lambda { A }.\, e   \ottsym{)} \, v \hookrightarrow e  \ottsym{[}  \underline{0}  \mapsto  v  \ottsym{]} }{%
{\ottdrulename{sred\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulesredXXappl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \hookrightarrow e'_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
}{
 e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow e'_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{sred\_appl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulesredXXappr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \hookrightarrow v_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e'_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{sred\_appr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsred}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ e \hookrightarrow e' $}{\ottcom{Reduction of STLC}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesredXXbeta{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesredXXappl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesredXXappr{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsSred}{
\ottdefnsred{}}

% defns Sbig
%% defn sbig
\newcommand{\ottdrulesbigXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \ottmv{i}  \Rightarrow  \ottmv{i}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{sbig\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulesbigXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \lambda { A }.\, e  \Rightarrow  \lambda { A }.\, e  }{%
{\ottdrulename{sbig\_lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulesbigXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \Rightarrow  \lambda { A }.\, e  }%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
\ottpremise{ e  \ottsym{[}  \underline{0}  \mapsto  v_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \ottsym{]} \Rightarrow v }%
}{
 e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}} \Rightarrow v }{%
{\ottdrulename{sbig\_app}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsbig}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ e \Rightarrow e' $}{\ottcom{Big-step semantics of STLC}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesbigXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesbigXXlam{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulesbigXXapp{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsSbig}{
\ottdefnsbig{}}

% defns SMul
%% defn sMul

\newcommand{\ottdefnsMul}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ e \hookrightarrow ^* e' $}{\ottcom{Multistep Reduction}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsSMul}{
\ottdefnsMul{}}

% defns crel
%% defn crel
\newcommand{\ottdrulecrelXXtop}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \varepsilon  \sim   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{crel\_top}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulecrelXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ A  \sim  \Gamma_{\lambda} }%
}{
 A  \, \& \,  B  \sim   \Gamma_{\lambda} ,  B  }{%
{\ottdrulename{crel\_and}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncrel}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma  \sim  \Gamma_{\lambda} $}{\ottcom{Context Correspondence}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecrelXXtop{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulecrelXXand{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnscrel}{
\ottdefncrel{}}

% defns vrel
%% defn vrel
\newcommand{\ottdrulevrelXXlit}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \ottmv{i}   \sim   \ottmv{i}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{vrel\_lit}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulevrelXXlam}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \substf( v , e' , 1 )   \ottsym{=}  e}%
}{
  \langle v ,  \lambda   A  .\, e'  \rangle   \sim   \lambda { A }.\, e  }{%
{\ottdrulename{vrel\_lam}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnvrel}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ v  \sim  v_{\lambda} $}{\ottcom{Value Correspondence}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulevrelXXlit{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulevrelXXlam{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsvrel}{
\ottdefnvrel{}}

% defns erel
%% defn erel
\newcommand{\ottdruleerelXXclosure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \vdash _{ \widehat{\rho} }  e }%
}{
   \bra{ s }_{s}   \triangleright  e   \sim   e  [  s  ]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{erel\_closure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleerelXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \sim  c_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \sim  c_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
}{
 e_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, e_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \sim  c_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, c_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{erel\_app}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnerel}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ e  \sim  c $}{\ottcom{Correspondence}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleerelXXclosure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleerelXXapp{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnserel}{
\ottdefnerel{}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnss}{
\ottdefnsconflict
\ottdefnsunique
\ottdefnsctm
\ottdefnsTyping
\ottdefnsRtyping
\ottdefnsselect
\ottdefnsReduction
\ottdefnsMulti
\ottdefnsRMulti
\ottdefnsBstep
\ottdefnsRRed
\ottdefnsBrstep
\ottdefnsRed
\ottdefnsStyp
\ottdefnsSred
\ottdefnsSbig
\ottdefnsSMul
\ottdefnscrel
\ottdefnsvrel
\ottdefnserel
}

\newcommand{\ottall}{\ottmetavars\\[0pt]
\ottgrammar\\[5.0mm]
\ottdefnss}
